meaning: n.小狗,幼畜,自负的傻小子v.生小狗
examples: I felt like a scared little pup, because there were so many people in one room.
The judge then offered to cut an additional 20 days if Clark dresses up as Safety Pup.
"It should have been me," one pup sighs, nearly satirizing in both the public and the occasion.
Drifting in a kayak is one of the best ways to spot a mother otter with her pup.
Michelson, the old dog, provided wisdom that complemented the energy of the young pup Bradley.
